title: Better Vision
body: 🌙 **Night Vision - See Clearly in the Dark!** 🌙 Tired of stumbling around in the dark during your mining and exploring adventures? This resource pack gives you permanent **night vision**, allowing you to see clearly in caves, forests, and the Nether without needing potions or external effects! ✨ **Features:** - ✅ Permanent night vision for full visibility in the dark - ✅ Works in all biomes and dimensions, including caves and the Nether - ✅ Compatible with 1.21+ - ✅ Lightweight and FPS-friendly 🔧 **Requirements:** - ⚠️ OptiFine is required 🎮 Perfect for players who want an enhanced experience without worrying about darkness, from survival to speedrunning!
